trends.trend_label: Jonathan Anderson Sculptural RTW — Balloon & Volume Silhouettes
trends.cluster_summary: A concentrated signal around Loewe's SS26 ready-to-wear silhouettes — specifically Jonathan Anderson's balloon sleeve dresses, oversized knit co-ords, and sculptural coat shapes. XHS creators are framing these pieces as wearable art, drawing explicit comparisons to ceramics and installation sculpture. The posts that perform best are not styling guides but analytical breakdowns of proportion and craft intention, attracting an audience that wants to understand the design thinking, not just the look.
trends.top_post_example: Loewe SS26的气球袖裙 不是在追时髦 是JW Anderson在用布料重新定义人体轮廓 你会怎么佩戴一件雕塑？ #Loewe #罗意威 #JWAnderson #廓形设计 #可穿戴艺术 #SS26成衣

trends.trend_label: Loewe Puzzle Bag SS26 Colourway Surge
trends.cluster_summary: Strong, sustained engagement around the Loewe Puzzle Bag in SS26's new seasonal colourways — particularly Sand, Dusty Rose, and Deep Navy. Posts are splitting between unpacking-and-construction content (close-up seam and leather grain documentation) and editorial styling that emphasises the bag's geometric form against architectural settings. The craft angle is driving disproportionately high saves, with comment threads that read more like leather education than fashion discourse.
trends.top_post_example: Loewe Puzzle包的皮料是怎么选的？今天拆解一下SS26的Sand色 把同款包侧面的缝线放大来看 每一条缝都在力学上承重 这不是装饰性皮具 是三维工程 #Loewe #Puzzle包 #罗意威 #皮具工艺 #手工皮革 #SS26

trends.cluster_summary: A growing content cluster built around Loewe's Spanish craft heritage — specifically posts documenting the brand's Madrid workshop lineage, hand-stitching processes, and the provenance of its calf and nappa leathers. This is creator-led education rather than brand marketing, with high-knowledge accounts breaking down how Loewe's interlaced leather panels are constructed. The trend is generating outsized saves from an audience that appears to be mid-consideration — researching before a first Loewe purchase.
trends.top_post_example: 为什么罗意威的皮具比其他品牌贵？今天从西班牙工坊传承说起——Loewe 1846年成立 比LV还早 手工制皮的历史比你想象的更深 #Loewe #罗意威 #西班牙皮具 #手工传承 #奢侈品教育 #品牌故事
